# Repo Map

Use this file when the task spans multiple customization surfaces.

## Source skills

- `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`
- `skills/<name>/references/`

## Shared cross-agent examples

- `.agents/skills/`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `GEMINI.md`
- `frontend-setup-standards.md`

## GitHub-native examples

- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/`
- `.github/skills/`
- `.github/agents/`

## Windsurf-native examples

- `.windsurf/skills/`
- `.windsurf/workflows/`
- `.windsurf/rules/`

## Discovery

- `README.md`
